latin: Dracarys! regina dracones suos iussit et flammae de caelo ceciderunt. hostes territi fugerunt, sed sero — ignis omnia consumpsit.

questions.target: They fled in terror but it was too late
choices: They fled in terror but it was too late

translation: Dracarys! The queen commanded her dragons and flames fell from the sky. The terrified enemies fled, but it was too late — the fire consumed everything.
